params.name: Vermilion Pot
params.description: Vermilion was originally a divine bird who guards the world. By chance, it encountered the Master Chef and tasted his personally made dishes. It felt that a great bird's life should be accompanied by delicious food, so it transformed into a pot, allowing it to taste the freshest dishes...
